functions.title: Guide Book #51
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #51§r
§lMossheep§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Medium mammal, Nature-elemental, Animal.
•§lSpawns in§r: Mossy Forest, Swampland.
•§lHealth§r: 8
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25

•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Mossy Willow Sapling
•§lBred by§r: Mossy Willow Sapling
•§lAged by§r: Mossy Willow Sapling
•§lPossible drops§r: Moss Block, Raw Mutton, XP Orbs.
•Mossed Adult Mossheep can produce a §lMoss Block§r,

when interacted with using Shears.
•Can eat a Moss Block, Moss Carpet, Pale Moss Block, Pale Moss Carpet, and Moss Sprouts beneath them, and it will restore their sheared moss on their body.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Mossheep is a gentle, moss-covered creature that roams the damp environments of Mossy Forests and Swamplands. This passive, nature-infused animal thrives on mossy vegetation and is especially fond of Mossy Willow Saplings.
When sheared, it yields Moss Blocks and can regrow its moss by grazing on mossy terrain. Both mystical and earthy, the Mossheep adds a lush touch of life to any wild, green landscape.§’
